group_1.textRight: [chara:104700:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]Ee-eeeek!!

group_1.textLeft: Y-Yuu-san...?
(She looks completely different, but...)
(She DID tell me she was a Magical Girl...@didn't she?)

group_1.textRight: I got worried when you didn't come back,@so I figured I should go looking for you?
Looks like you were just in a Witch's Labyrinth,@though. That's good, that's good.

group_1.textLeft: Ah...AAAAAAAAARGH!! I FINALLY managed@to track you down!

group_1.textRight: Mm?
Oh? Nagisa-chan! It was Nagisa-chan, right?
Wow, am I ever glad to see you again...!

group_1.textLeft: You two know each other...?

group_1.textRight: ...You could say that.
But there's something more important right now!@My top-priority goal!
Nagisa here is gonna fix the Hotsure in this@universe...!
What's wrong, Nagisa-chan? You look kinda@scary...
Did I do something to make you upset?

group_1.textLeft: Were you not the one who left all those guys@behind in the train station...
...after you "got rid of them"?

group_1.textRight: Ah!
Did you clean them up, Nagisa-chan?
But you've got me all wrong, you know?
I wasn't just gonna leave them there?
I'd been meaning to take care of the mess@myself...
...but then there were no Witch Labyrinths nearby,@right?

group_1.textLeft: What was your game plan for if something like@that got reported?!

group_1.textRight: Hyah! [chara:390100:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:390100:eyeClose_0][chara:390100:lipSynch_1]I'm sorry for bothering you, okay?
Are you still mad at me, Nagisa-chan?

group_1.textLeft: *Sigh*... You're the same as ever.
Yuu, has the hollow pit inside of you been filled@in yet?

group_1.textRight: Nope!
It just keeps getting deeper and deeper.
The "me" inside myself is like a little grain of sand@at this point.

group_1.textLeft: ...I see, huh.
Don't take this personally, but...!

group_1.textRight: Why, whyyyyy! I hate violeeeence!

group_1.textLeft: (Yuu uses a mysterious magic.)

group_1.textRight: [flashEffect:flashWhiteSlow2]W-woah?!
I'm trapped in a soap bubble!

group_1.textLeft: [surround:2007A01][chara:390100:effect_7000_attack01](She won't be able to do anything like this!)
[flashEffect:flashRed2][chara:200700:effect_shake]Ngh?!
This feeling...! Bad news...I'm gonna...

group_1.textRight: [chara:104700:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]Uwagh! I-i-is she okay?!

group_1.textLeft: ...Seems like she just fainted.

group_1.textRight: A-and what's with the ghost lady?

group_1.textLeft: I think she's a Magical Girl too...probably.

group_1.textRight: A M-Magi...?!
What a pain, what a pain...
Is this my fault again? What do I do?!

group_1.textLeft: Yuu-san, what's going on with this gi...
*Gasp?!*

group_1.textRight: What was that?!

group_1.textLeft: (The man who passed out earlier...woke up...)

group_1.textRight: Mm?
Ah, Kuroe-chan, you're amazing! You found him!
That's the bad guy I was looking for!
You're "John," right?

group_1.textLeft: P-please forgive me! I...I was forced into it!
I really didn't wanna do it at all, honest!
I can't believe I helped with somethin' like that...!

group_1.textRight: Mm, I dunno what to tell you.
You're on my list, which means you're definitely@a bad person.
[surround:3901A01][chara:801100:effect_7001_attack02]So you kinda have to go?

group_1.textLeft: [chara:801100:effect_7003_damage02][surround:3901A03][bgEffect:shakeSmall]Gah...!

group_1.textRight: Nn? Is something wrong?

group_1.textLeft: I don't know the details of what happened...
...but if you take this any further, he'll die!

group_1.textRight: Well...[chara:390100:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:390100:cheek_0][chara:390100:face_mtn_ex_010.exp3.json:motion_100][chara:390100:lipSynch_1]yeah? I'm gonna make sure I get rid@of him?

group_1.textLeft: Get rid of... There's no way.

group_1.textRight: Oh, is it the method you have an issue with?@[chara:390100:lipSynch_0][wait:1.2][chara:390100:cheek_0][chara:390100:face_mtn_ex_010.exp3.json][chara:390100:lipSynch_1]I was thinking I'd stab him.

group_1.textLeft: D-d-d-don't! We're Magical Girls! We can't...!

group_1.textRight: Eh?! Are you telling me that Magical Girls aren't@supposed to stab anything?

group_1.textLeft: If he's a bad person, let's just catch him@and hand him over to the police...!

group_1.textRight: Ah, um... Right, about that.
Maybe you didn't know this, Kuroe-chan, but...
Even if you hand a bad guy over to the cops...
...They don't actually get rid of them!
I was surprised when I first learned that, too!
So, um, that's kinda the thing?
Since the police won't take him out, that's not@really gonna work, you know?
Y-you two! Hurry up and get outta here!
She's insane! She massacred my higher-ups@already...!

group_1.textLeft: Your higher-ups...? Sh-she ki...?

group_1.textRight: They were on my list and everything,@so they were bad guys, okay?
Which meant I had to get rid of them?

group_1.textLeft: (That metallic smell... Don't tell me that really@was blood...?)

group_1.textCenter: I tried to call them over one at a time,@but they all came at once, right?
And like, since there were so many of them...
...I couldn't carry them all to the Witch's Labyrinth.@I was in a real bind...
If I just left these guys lying around after I took@them out...
...Shii would be totally furious with me...
Which is why I had to... [chara:390100:lipSynch_0][wait:1.2][chara:390100:cheek_0][chara:390100:face_mtn_ex_050.exp3.json][chara:390100:lipSynch_1]Hm? What was I talking@about, again?

group_1.textRight: S-see what I mean?! This bitch is nuts!
Get outta here as fast as you can!

group_1.textLeft: But...you're hurt...

group_1.textRight: I can manage, just beat it already!

group_1.textCenter: I was saying something about getting rid of@bad guys, wasn't I?
So you girls should step away for a little bit@to keep yourselves out of danger, okay?

group_1.textLeft: [flashEffect:flashRed1][surround:3901A03][bgEffect:shakeSmall][chara:104300:effect_shake]Kyah!

group_1.textRight: [flashEffect:flashRed1][surround:3901A03][bgEffect:shakeSmall][chara:104700:effect_shake]Bwah— Eep?!

group_1.textCenter: Wha—?! It's like I told you, this guy is really@dangerous!

group_1.textLeft: Run!
O-okhaaaay!
